prompt: Generate a screenshot of a Google Cloud digital receipt, with the reference image logo. Include a billing item "Vertex AI API 300 USD" in the receipt.
searchQueryGenerated: High resolution screenshot of digital payment receipt
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a Google Cloud digital receipt. The receipt must prominently display the Google Cloud logo (image 1) in the header section, ideally positioned in the top-left corner. Include a specific billing line item stating 'Vertex AI API 300 USD' within the itemized charges section of the receipt. The screenshot should resemble a typical web-based or digital receipt, featuring elements like a date, customer information, and a total amount.
objects: Google Cloud logo (in the header, top-left corner)
Billing line item "Vertex AI API 300 USD"
